message:
feat(algorithms,classes,python): simplify edge removal, clean up clippy lints, and add clustering bindings

classes: Replaces .retain() with explicit .shift_remove() calls in
remove_node for both Graph/MultiGraph and DiGraph/MultiDiGraph.
Removes redundant HashSet-based fallback deduplication from
edges_ordered() in favor of direct adjacency iteration.

algorithms: Adds #[allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)] to
stoer_wagner. Refactors nested if-let chains in voronoi_cells,
min_cost_flow, and node_disjoint_paths to use && pattern matching
for cleaner control flow.

python: Adds clustering_rust(), average_clustering_rust(), and
transitivity_rust() bindings with py.allow_threads() wrapping for
GIL release during computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
